title: Renew an adult passport from the US - Canada.ca
content:
## Renew a passport from the US
Where are you right now? Canada | US | Outside Canada and the US
From [Error loading fee. Check the fee list .]
20 business days, plus mail time

## Passport and travel document service fees have increased
As of March 31, 2026 , most fees for passports and travel document services have increased. Learn how these changes may affect your application .
If you already have an adult passport, you may be able to renew it. Renewing a passport is simpler than applying for a new one. This is because you don’t need a guarantor, proof of Canadian citizenship or supporting identification.
You can’t renew a child passport. You need to apply for a new one each time it expires.
